draft.subject: Quick idea for Pannell Associates
draft.body:
Hi Amber,

Representatives juggle a lot—tracking leads, following up with clients, managing inventory questions. Most of that follow-up is repetitive.

We help manufacturers' reps automate the intake process: a customer inquiry hits your system, an AI agent pulls the spec sheet and available stock, and sends the rep a one-page brief ready to act on. No more digging through emails.

Always good to work with local Oklahoma businesses. Want to see how this could cut your admin time this week?

Kevin Starr
Founder, Starr & Partners

personalization_notes: Referenced manufacturers rep role, local Oklahoma location (Mustang), pain point around follow-up and data gathering
